title: Area Calculator - Calculate Area of Shapes
description: Free area calculator. Calculate the area of rectangles, triangles, circles, trapezoids, ellipses, parallelograms, and sectors.
keywords: area calculator, rectangle area, circle area, triangle area, shape calculator
intro: Calculate the area of common shapes including rectangles, triangles, circles, trapezoids, ellipses, parallelograms, and sectors.

faq.a: Rectangle, triangle, circle, trapezoid, ellipse, parallelogram, and sector.
Rectangle: l×w. Triangle: ½×b×h. Circle: πr². Trapezoid: (b1+b2)/2×h. Ellipse: π×a×b. Parallelogram: b×h. Sector: (θ/360)×πr².
